description: Lists global program settings and information related to structural elements. The information includes: large-strain update interval, damping information, behavior during creation of links, liner behavior during large-strain sliding, maximum equilibrium ratios during the last step, and current number of structural-element entities (cables, beams, nodes, etc.).

6.0.description: Lists general information about structural element settings. This list includes the timestep safety factor, the mass scaling settings, the damping scheme in place, the link tolerances, the default large-strain sliding settings, the number of elements, nodes, and links, etc.

7.0.reason: Not listed in the official FLAC3D 7.0 contents command index.
